calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin N. Lettunich Esq., via zoom, for Erica Velasquez, petitioner.

The Court addressed the petition and asked if anyone was appearing to object.

There being no objections, the Court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt/Jackie Alameda. Deputy: Pleigo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Continued To Jan-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin N. Lettunich, via Zoom, for Erica Valasquez, Personal Representative; Jaime Marcello, via Zoom, in propria persona, Objector.

Mr. Marcello reports of his continued efforts to find an attorney but that he has not yet hired counsel. Mr. Lettunich reports of failed attempts to discuss this matter with Objector. The court advises Objector of its intent to continue this matter to allow him to file written objections. Objector is advised that if he has not filed written objections by the deadline to be set by the court, the court intends to proceed with adjudication of this matter.

The matter is continued to Jan-31-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Objector is instructed in open court to file written objections by Jan-17-2023. Mr. Lettunich is advised in open court that responses to objections are to be filed by Jan-24-2023.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Continued To Feb-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Continued To Dec-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin Lettunich, via CourtCall, for Erica Velasquez, Administrator.

The court advises counsel that the court cannot order individual heirs to take out a loan and pay fees after real property has been distributed but that one option is for the Administrator to apply for a second loan to pay for costs related to administration. Mr. Lettunich requests a continuance.

The Accounting Petition is continued to Dec-14-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
